news.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
news.summary: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export control restrictions on Anthropic’s models Fable and Mythos, arguing that the order is going to limit the ability of cybersecurity defenders to secure their software and products.

news.title: SpaceX’s biggest-ever IPO just grew to $85.7 billion raised
news.summary: SpaceX's IPO underwriters maxed out their share purchases, adding to an already historic amount of money raised.

news.title: UK unveils sweeping social media ban for users under 16
news.summary: The ban would apply to a range of social media platforms, including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X.

news.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
news.summary: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

news.title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech
news.summary: Indian IT services company HCLTech is investing $150 million in the Bengaluru startup.

news.title: Roblox exec says ticking a box for age verification is ‘not enough anymore’

news.title: Did a medieval flying monk spot Halley's comet, twice? It's complicated
news.summary: University of Leicester historian thinks Eilmer of Malmesbury saw two different comets: in 1018 and 1066

news.summary: There's nothing new or surprising, but it's still an entertaining film from one of our greatest directors.

news.title: Threads of underground fungal networks are long enough to reach beyond the Solar System
news.summary: Researchers have quantified the length and mass of arbuscular mycorrhizal fungal networks globally.

news.title: The Kratom Civil War Is Heating Up, and MAHA Has Picked a Side
news.summary: Both kratom and one of its active components, 7-OH, have opioid-like effects and are widely available across the US. As health secretary RFK Jr. aims to get 7-OH banned, proponents of both are fighting.

news.title: How Apple Is Making Your Older iPhone Run Faster and Stay Alive Longer
news.summary: Even the aging iPhone 11 will feel a little more responsive soon, thanks to improvements in an unsung iOS feature.

news.title: 1 in 4 World Cup Matches Could Be Played in Dangerous Temperatures
news.summary: A new report warns that Miami, Kansas City, Philadelphia, Dallas, and Houston could be particularly hot places to play during the 2026 World Cup.

news.title: A Crypto Scam Targeted a Gay OnlyFans Star. Then His X Feed Was Flooded With ‘MAGA Propaganda’
news.summary: In recent months hackers have attempted to extort money from porn stars with big followings, in some cases filling their feeds with pro-MAGA and crypto content.

news.title: The US Government Is Letting a Key Data Center Regulation Expire
news.summary: The federal government is planning to let a rule regulating federal data center operations sunset in September with no replacement.
